source_label_2025: Sample unit identifier. This identifier is created by scrambling together PSU, Sequence #1, Sequence #2, and the Frame Indicator for a case. It may be used in matching sample units from different waves.

Summary measure that indicates whether individual has a disability, where disability is defined as a value of 1 ('yes') on any of six core disability items (EHEARING, ESEEING, ECOGNIT, EAMBULAT, ESELFCARE, EERRANDS)
